lint.observation: Code follows project conventions. Implementation is well-documented with clear phase structure.

m3-deferred-attention-ar.description: Implement deferred attention allreduce: skip attention output allreduce and let FFN operate on partial activations
positiveObservations: Well-documented implementation with clear mathematical justification
Clean API design: set_deferred_attention_ar(enabled) provides simple toggle
Correct implementation of residual_add_v2 kernel using packed half2 operations
Both full attention and DeltaNet layer types are handled

appliedUpdates.description: Document deferred attention allreduce optimization technique and its numerical properties

summary.whatWasBuilt: Deferred attention allreduce optimization that reduces allreduce count from 128 to 64 per decode step by skipping attention output allreduce and letting FFN operate on partial activations. The partial attention output is added locally to hidden via residual_add_v2 kernel, and a single allreduce is performed after FFN down-projection.
summary.currentStatus: All validation criteria passed. Cosine similarity 0.9957 >= 0.99 threshold. Throughput 34.06 tok/s (1.27x improvement over 26.82 tok/s standard). Allreduce count reduced from 128 to 64 per token (50% reduction).
summary.nextSteps: Proceed to user-testing-validator for full end-to-end validation on GPU server.
